title: Towny Menu - Update
description: This project is a simple GUI menu plugin to be used as an add-on for Towny Advanced
body:
This is an update of the author's original code and plugin, including lots of bug fixes and improvements.

### **About Towny Menu:**
Towny Menu is a simple plugin to be used as an add-on for Towny Advanced. With TownyMenu, many of the commands can now be done via a simple GUI menu. Minimesaage, Hex and Legacy colour modes are now fully supported/

All the GUI menu are configurable; size, icons and locations can be changed from the default options to your liking from within the settings.yml.

PlaceholderAPI should now be fully supported, using any placeholder from available plugins within the menus and or icon lores. However PlaceholderAPI (soft dependency) will need to be installed.

Player heads, HeadsDatabase (soft dependency) and Base54 heads are supported.

### **Requirements:**
[Towny](https://modrinth.com/plugin/towny) (for best stability use latest official release or pre-releases from the towny discord channel)

### **Commands:**
- /tm | /townmenu - Open the town management menu
- /nm | /nationmenu - Opens the nation management menu
- /plm |plotmenu - Opens the plot management menu
- /chunkview | cv - Places blocks on the chunk boarder of the chunk you are in without using f3+g. Super useful if you have Bedrock players on your server.
- /chunkviewparticle |chunkvp| cvp - Shows the chunk border with particles for a short period of time, without the need for f3+g.
- /tm reload - Reloads the settings.yml


**Permissions:**
- townmenu.view - Default true
  Also defaults to mayor, can be added to other ranks in the townyperms.yml file in your towny settings folder)
- townymenu.town.use - Default false. Add via permissions - add it to Mayor (and CoMayor if desired) rank/s in the townyperms.yml file in your Towny settings folder.
- townymenu.nation.use - Default false. Add via permissions - add to ranks in the townyperms.yml file in your Towny settings folder.

plotmenu.view - Default true
(can also only be used by the owner of a plot on their plot and the Mayor of a town can use it anywhere in their town)

chunkview.view - Default true
chunkviewparticle.view - Default true

Deny all the .view perms via your permissions plugin if you wish to restrict groups from access to certain commands.


**Admin Permissions:**
townymenu.plot.admin - Allows plots to be managed in any town
towny
townmenu.reload - Default op

Note: Some menu buttons require permissions for specific actions. For those actions a user must have permission for the default towny command to use the button. For those permissions check [Towny Permissions](https://github.com/TownyAdvanced/Towny/wiki/Towny-Permission-Nodes)

I have tested this plugin on 1.20.4+ servers.

### Soft Dependency

**HeadDatabase**
To use a HDB icon use `hdb-34567'
This however does not include the menu fillers

Any issues or suggestions, please use the GitHub link.

Please do join my [discord](https://discord.gg/Sgc6hy9CCS) server.

If you wish to help with translations then please visit my [Crowdin](https://crowdin.com/project/townymenu) page.
